sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49380" key="qumiateu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῡμι-ᾱτεύω</orth>, <sense id="n49380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fumigate</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὴν ἐκκλησίαν</foreign> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
